summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-Timeframe Confirmation (MTF) and Momentum Mode Bypass P1 features. All 10 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/access returns valid token with code 'Bullishalmarkhan7.7' - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/auto-trade/scan returns stats with mtf_conflict_rejections, momentum_mode_candidates, momentum_bypass_active - SUCCESS
Backend: Day trade candidates have mtf_aligned, has_tf_conflict, momentum_mode, momentum_bypass_active fields - SUCCESS
Backend: explanation.key_indicators includes mtf_5m, mtf_15m, mtf_1m, mtf_score, mtf_aligned, has_tf_conflict, momentum_mode, momentum_bypass_active - SUCCESS
Backend: Pipeline funnel tracks MTF conflict rejections in top_rejections - SUCCESS
Backend: Rejected candidates show MTF CONFLICT rejection reasons (5m structure opposes direction) - SUCCESS
Backend: Stats grid has all 9 required fields for display - SUCCESS
Backend: Buy reasons include 'MTF aligned: 5m+15m confirm' text for aligned candidates - SUCCESS
Backend: Momentum mode candidates tracked in stats (0 found during test - market conditions) - SUCCESS
Backend: Settings endpoint returns dt_confidence_threshold=65 - SUCCESS
Frontend: Auto Trade page loads with PAPER deploy mode badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: Auto Trade page shows CAUTIOUS risk mode badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: Auto Trade page shows NEUTRAL BEARISH | Vol: 14.8% regime badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: Diagnostics tab shows Pipeline Funnel with MTF rejection reasons highlighted in red - SUCCESS
Frontend: Diagnostics tab shows 'Multi-Timeframe & Momentum Mode' stats card with MTF Conflicts=6, Momentum Eligible=0, Momentum Bypassed=0, Setups Found=22, Filters Passed=15 - SUCCESS
Frontend: Candidates tab shows 9-column stats grid: Scanned(1250), T1 Analyzed(75), T2 Deep(20), Setups(22), MTF Conflicts(6), Momentum(0), Day Trades(12), Watchlist(149), Rejected(307) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Day trade candidates show MTF OK badge when mtf_aligned is true (VECO, NFLX, HAL, UNFI, CLMT, RSI, HESM, DOW, WM, NE, OHI) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Rejected candidates show TF CONFLICT badge when has_tf_conflict is true (SM, NEE, MO, BRX, VZ, STM) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Expanding candidate card shows MULTI-TIMEFRAME CONFIRMATION panel with 15m Trend, 5m Structure, 1m Timing, MTF Score - SUCCESS
Frontend: Buy reasons include 'MTF aligned: 5m+15m confirm SHORT (3/5)' text for aligned candidates - SUCCESS
Frontend: Rejected / Near-Miss DT section shows candidates with TF CONFLICT badges - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: MTF Confirmation correctly implements strict rules: 1min=entry timing, 5min=structure, 15min=trend
LONGs correctly require 5m bullish + 15m supportive/neutral (ranging acceptable)
SHORTs correctly require 5m bearish + 15m supportive/neutral (ranging acceptable)
1m conflicts correctly downgrade confidence only (not hard reject)
MTF scoring: aligned=+12 confidence, partial=+5, tf_conflict=-15, 1m_conflict=-5
Momentum Mode correctly requires: RelVol>2, breakout/breakdown setup, clear HH/HL or LH/LL, VWAP aligned, spread<=0.5%, NOT overextended, NOT fake breakout
Momentum Mode bypasses soft filters (RelVol minimum) but NOT risk rules, fake breakout, overextension, spread, or MTF conflicts
Pipeline funnel correctly tracks mtf_timeframe_conflict rejections with specific reasons (5m structure opposes direction)
Stats correctly include mtf_conflict_rejections, momentum_mode_candidates, momentum_bypass_active
Frontend correctly displays MTF OK badge (cyan) for aligned candidates and TF CONFLICT badge (red) for conflicting candidates
Frontend MTF panel correctly shows 15m Trend, 5m Structure, 1m Timing, MTF Score with color-coded values
seed_data_creation: None required - using live market data from Polygon API and cached TA signals in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: MTF Confirmation and Momentum Mode Bypass P1 features fully tested. Key features verified: 1) Stats include mtf_conflict_rejections, momentum_mode_candidates, momentum_bypass_active. 2) Day trade candidates have mtf_aligned, has_tf_conflict, momentum_mode, momentum_bypass_active fields. 3) explanation.key_indicators includes mtf_5m, mtf_15m, mtf_1m, mtf_score. 4) Pipeline funnel tracks MTF rejections with specific reasons. 5) Frontend shows MTF OK badge (cyan) for aligned candidates, TF CONFLICT badge (red) for conflicting candidates. 6) Expanded candidate card shows MULTI-TIMEFRAME CONFIRMATION panel with 15m Trend, 5m Structure, 1m Timing, MTF Score. 7) Diagnostics tab shows 'Multi-Timeframe & Momentum Mode' stats card. 8) Candidates tab shows 9-column stats grid including MTF Conflicts and Momentum columns. 9) Buy reasons include 'MTF aligned: 5m+15m confirm' text. 10) Momentum Mode was 0 during testing (market conditions - no explosive movers meeting all criteria).

rules.1m: entry timing only, conflicts downgrade confidence
rules.5m: structure - must be supportive (bullish for LONG, bearish for SHORT, ranging acceptable)

requirements: Clear structure (HH+HL for bullish, LH+LL for bearish)

frontend_components.mtf_momentum_stats_card: Shows MTF Conflicts, Momentum Eligible, Momentum Bypassed, Setups Found, Filters Passed
frontend_components.stats_grid_9_columns: Scanned, T1 Analyzed, T2 Deep, Setups, MTF Conflicts, Momentum, Day Trades, Watchlist, Rejected
frontend_components.mtf_panel: Shows 15m Trend, 5m Structure, 1m Timing, MTF Score in expanded candidate card
frontend_components.pipeline_funnel: Shows MTF rejection reasons highlighted in red
